toast.cannotInviteMoreUsers: Your {{plan}} plan allows {{maxUsers}} users. You currently have {{currentUsers}} users and {{pendingInvitations}} pending invitations.
toast.userRemoved: {{name}} has been removed from the workspace.
toast.copyInviteLink: Email is disabled. Share this link with the invited user.

invite.title: Invite Team Members
invite.description: Send invitations to add new members to your workspace.
invite.descriptionNoEmail: Create invitation links to share with new team members.
invite.emailDisabledBanner: Email is not configured. An invitation link will be generated for you to share manually.
invite.userLimitReached: You've reached your user limit ({{max}} users). Upgrade your plan to invite more users.
invite.emailPlaceholder: Type an email and press Enter to add
invite.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
invite.resultDescription: Share this link with {{email}} to join your workspace. The link expires in 7 days.
invite.copyFailed: Failed to copy link to clipboard

emailChange.smtpDisabledMessage: Email delivery is not configured. Email changes require a verification email to be sent. Please configure SMTP in your instance settings first.

personal.securityDescription: Manage your password and email address for account security

workspace.subtitleViewing: Details and usage for this workspace.
workspace.subtitleEditing: Edit workspace details. Changes apply immediately.
workspace.name: Workspace Name
workspace.contactEmailDesc: Used for workspace-related notifications and administrative contact.
workspace.factsHint: Counts may reflect your current plan and usage reporting.
workspace.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this workspace and all its data. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete the workspace {{name}} and all associated data including servers, alerts, alert rules, team members, invitations, and configuration. This action is irreversible.
workspace.deleteDialogConfirmLabel: Type the workspace name to confirm:
workspace.noWorkspaceDesc: You’re not currently associated with any workspace.
workspace.unackedWarnThresholdDesc: Highlight vhost rows in yellow when unacknowledged messages exceed this count.

team.workspaceMembersSubtitle: {{workspace}} — members and access for this workspace.
team.title: Team
team.scopeHelp: These users have access to this workspace.
team.noTeamMembers: No team members found. Invite users to get started.
team.adminOnly: Only workspace administrators can view and manage team members.
team.removeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} ({{email}}) from this workspace?
team.removeDialogWarning: This action cannot be undone. The user will lose access to all workspace resources and will need to be re-invited to regain access.
team.addFromOrgDescription: Add existing organization members to this workspace.
team.addFromOrgAllHaveAccess: All organization members already have access.

org.title: Organization
org.subtitle: Manage your organization settings and members
org.notInOrg: You are not part of an organization yet.
org.name: Name
org.billingEmailDesc: Used for billing and administrative communications.
org.roleDescOwner: Full control of the organization, billing, and membership
org.roleDescOrgAdmin: Can invite members, manage roles, and configure workspaces
org.roleDescOrgMember: Can view organization members and accept invitations
org.roleDescWsAdmin: Full access to servers, alerts, rules, and settings
org.roleDescWsMember: Can view resources and acknowledge alerts
org.roleDescWsReadonly: View-only access to all workspace resources
org.noWorkspacesInOrg: No workspaces found in the organization.
org.removeMemberDesc: Remove {{email}} from the organization? They will lose access to all organization workspaces.
org.searchPlaceholder: Search members by name, email, or role
org.yourInvitationsDesc: You have been invited to other organizations
org.yourInvitationsNoOrg: You have been invited to join the following organizations
org.inviteToOrgDesc: Send an invitation to join your organization. If email is not configured, you can copy the invite link to share manually.
org.emailNotConfigured: Email is not configured. Share this link with the invited user:
org.grantAllWorkspacesDesc: Recommended for most teams. New workspaces will be included automatically.
org.selectWorkspacesDesc: Turn this off to grant access to specific workspaces only.
